channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Monday, June 15
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 02:47 PM (2.518 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 11:41 PM (-0.483 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 13 G 24 mph
